_comment: Synced from Printful store 17873034 (TCDA) on 2026-03-17. Includes Printful size tables for static fallback.

size_tables.description: This size guide shows body measurements. We suggest ordering a size up when your measurements are between sizes.
size_tables.image_description:
For all horizontal measurements, please keep the tape measure parallel to the ground.

 

A Chest

Put one end of the tape measure on the fullest part of the chest and bring the tape around the back (under the armpits, over the shoulder blades) to where you started.

 

B Waist

Place the tape on the narrowest part of the waist and measure around.

 

C Hips

Put the beginning of the tape measure on one hip and bring the tape across the fullest part of the hips back to where you started measuring.

size_tables.description: This size guide shows product measurements taken when products are laid flat. Actual product measurements may vary by up to 1" because they’re custom-made by hand.
size_tables.image_description:
A - 1/2 chest width

B -  Length

C - Sleeve length
